name: Frey
title: Noble Princess
description: Self Toughness Fixed DMG temporarily increases by 1 on attack.

novaBurst.attackDesc: Temporarily deals 1 more Toughness Fixed DMG and deals 20% more damage on attack.

skills.name: Bet Refusal
skills.description: Frey slaps the enemy across the face with all her might in response to their ridiculous bet. Grants self 1 stack of Chill. Uses Forced Negotiation instead of Bet Refusal when using this Skill on self turn at max High Roller (Undispellable) stacks. Forced Negotiation: Frey brings down a crushing blow on the enemy in response to their ridiculous bet. Deals 100% increased damage on attack. Increases self Action Gauge by 30% and grants self 1 stack of Chill after attacking, then removes High Roller (Undispellable).

skills.name: All In
skills.description: Frey wagers all her chips to support all allies. Grants all allies CRIT Rate Up for 3 turns, then grants self a stack of Chill with a 75% chance, 3 times total. Grants self an extra turn.

skills.name: Cash In
skills.description: Frey removes all Chill stacks and grants herself 1 stack of High Roller (Undispellable) if Chill is at max stacks at the start of the turn. Chill stacks are not removed if High Roller (Undispellable) is at max stacks at the start of the turn. Increases self Action Gauge by 8%, then grants self 1 stack of High Roller (Undispellable) with a 50% chance after a Moon Attribute ally (excluding self) attacks.

levels.description: Frey removes all Chill stacks and grants herself 1 stack of High Roller (Undispellable) if Chill is at max stacks at the start of the turn. Chill stacks are not removed if High Roller (Undispellable) is at max stacks at the start of the turn. Increases self Action Gauge by 8%, then grants self 1 stack of High Roller (Undispellable) with a 50% chance after a Moon Attribute ally (excluding self) attacks.
